title: OpenAI Codex adds Record & Replay and stronger automation controls
friendlyTitle: Codex can learn a workflow by watching it once
summary: OpenAI’s June 18 Codex app update adds Record & Replay on macOS, turning a demonstrated workflow into a reusable skill. The same release adds bulk actions for automation history and handoff between local and remote hosts.
friendlySummary: OpenAI added a Codex feature that can watch a user do a task and turn it into a reusable skill. It also improved how automations are managed.
whyItMatters: Demonstration-to-skill workflows reduce the friction of teaching an AI assistant how a business process works. For teams, the important question becomes governance: which repeated actions should run unattended, and under what sandbox rules?
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make repeated computer tasks easier to automate. It also means teams need clear safety rules before letting AI repeat actions on its own.
